description: One tab of the Konomi reference API browser. Each panel is a self-contained ES module that exports { id, label, render(bundle), wire?(bundle, host) }. Register new panels by dropping a file into guild/Enterprise/L4/api/konomi/js/ and adding an instance here.

id.description: stable panel id — must match the tab button's data-t attribute and the exported .id on the module

label.description: human label shown on the tab button

module.description: relative path to the ES module implementing the panel

declares.description: which Konomi concepts this panel exercises
